post.summary: Extract knowledge from a git commit
Store a memory with simplified input (productization endpoint).
Create a new plan from a goal

get.summary: Get task dependency graph for a plan

post.summary: POST /project/export — Export a project snapshot as JSON.
POST /project/import — Import a project snapshot from JSON.
POST /project/snapshot — Generate a new project snapshot.

get.summary: GET /project/{id}/context — Generate portable AI context for a project.
GET /project/{id}/snapshot — Get the latest project snapshot as JSON.

last_check.description: Unix microseconds of last health check.

Alternative.description: An alternative that was considered but not chosen.

ExecutionVersion.description: Optimistic concurrency control for state mutations.

commit_hash.description: Git commit hash. Defaults to HEAD if omitted.

project_id.description: Project ID to associate the extracted knowledge with.

repo_path.description: Path to the repository root. Defaults to current directory if omitted.

properties.description: Flexible JSON properties (e.g., function signature, LOC, complexity)

confidence.description: Confidence decays 0.1 per hop: depth 1 = 0.9, depth 2 = 0.8, etc.
0.0 – 1.0; human writes default 1.0; agent writes default 0.7

content.description: Structured JSON payload — shape varies per memory_type

NodeId.description: Unique identifier for a node in the cluster.

PageRequest.description: Base request for paginated list endpoints.

PortableContext.description: A portable context payload that can be sent to any AI model.

project_name.description: The project this context was generated for.

text.description: The full rendered text, ready to paste into an AI context window.

ProjectSnapshot.description:
A comprehensive snapshot of a project's state, structure, and history.
This is the primary output of the Project Memory Engine.

ReasoningStep.description: A single reasoning step in the chain that led to the decision.

Risk.description: A risk associated with the decision.

SnapshotMeta.description: Lightweight snapshot metadata (without the full JSON payload).
